name: Old Fashioned Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer raisins and water over medium heat until raisins are plump, about 15 minutes.
2. Drain raisins, reserving liquid. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to make 1/2 cup.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Mix together Crisco, sugar, eggs, and vanilla in a bowl until well combined.
5. Stir in the reserved liquid mixture.
6. Slowly blend in the remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, baking powder, dry oats, nuts) until just incorporated.
7. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cookies are golden brown.
9. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
10. Store in airtight containers.
